title: NVIDIA GeForce RTX 5090 Graphics Cards
snippet: The GeForce RTX 5090 is the most powerful GeForce GPU ever made, but it has not been released yet. See the features, specs, and buying options of this graphics card that supports ray tracing, DLSS 4, and AI technologies.

title: GeForce RTX 50 series - Wikipedia
snippet: GeForce RTX 50 series ... The GeForce RTX 50 series of consumer graphics cards is the successor of Nvidia 's GeForce 40 series. Announced at CES 2025, it debuted with the release of the RTX 5070, RTX 5080 and RTX 5090 in January 2025.

title: NVIDIA GeForce RTX 5090 Specs | TechPowerUp GPU Database
snippet: The GeForce RTX 5090 is an enthusiast-class graphics card by NVIDIA, launched on January 30th, 2025. It features 21760 shading units, 680 tensor cores, 170 raytracing acceleration cores, and 32 GB GDDR7 memory.

title: Nvidia GeForce RTX 5090 specs | PC Gamer
snippet: The RTX 5090 release date is January 30, 2025. It will come in a shiny new Founders Edition form, which is significantly slimmer than the chonky cards that formed the RTX 4090 range.

title: RTX 5090, 5080, and 5070 series GPUs: Everything you need to know - CORSAIR
snippet: The RTX 5090 is the flagship of the 50 Series GPUs from NVIDIA, with 21760 CUDA cores, 32 GB GDDR7 memory, and a 575W TGP. It will be released on January 30th, 2025, and will cost $1,999 / €2329 / £1,939.
